## FacetFilter interface

A filter which is associated with a [Facet](./x-types.facet.md)<!-- -->.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface FacetFilter extends Filter 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [Filter](./x-types.filter.md)

## Remarks

It is like an "abstract" interface because it is not going to be implemented but it is extended by other interfaces. There will never be an object with this type.

## Properties

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [facetId](./x-types.facetfilter.facetid.md) | [Facet](./x-types.facet.md)<!-- -->\['id'\] | An unique ID that identifies the facet that uses this filter. |
|  [modelName](./x-types.facetfilter.modelname.md) | Exclude&lt;[FilterModelName](./x-types.filtermodelname.md)<!-- -->, 'RawFilter'&gt; | The filter [model name](./x-types.modelnametype.md) excluding [RawFilter](./x-types.rawfilter.md) model name. |
